routeTableId.description: The ID of the route table

routes.description: The routes in the route table

destinationCidrBlock.description: The IPv4 CIDR block used for the destination match

destinationIpv6CidrBlock.description: The IPv6 CIDR block used for the destination match

gatewayId.description: The ID of the gateway attached to your VPC

natGatewayId.description: The ID of a NAT gateway

networkInterfaceId.description: The ID of the network interface

origin.description: Describes how the route was created

associations.description: The associations between the route table and subnets or gateways

main.description: Indicates whether this is the main route table

ownerId.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the route table

tags.description: Any tags assigned to the route table
